name: Zhongyu Gas Holdings Limited
summary: Zhongyu Gas Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the development, construction, and operation of natural gas projects in the People's Republic of China. The company is involved in the investment, operation, and management of gas pipeline infrastructure; distribution of piped gas to residential, industrial, and commercial users; operation of compressed natural gas and liquefied natural gas vehicle filling stations; and sale of stoves and related equipment, as well as trading of natural, coal, and liquefied petroleum gas. It also engages in the designing and consulting of energy projects; research and development of natural gas technology; sale of gas equipment and materials; gas pipeline construction; dangerous goods transportation; digital and information technology development; and provision of related consultancy services. The company was formerly known as MRC Holdings Limited and changed its name to Zhongyu Gas Holdings Limited in February 2004. Zhongyu Gas Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
